description:
cloudstack_autoscale_vm_profile

Creates an autoscale VM profile.

argument_reference.name: service_offering
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the service offering used for instances. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: template
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the template used for instances.

argument_reference.name: zone
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the zone where instances will be created. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

argument_reference.name: destroy_vm_grace_period
argument_reference.description: A time interval to wait for graceful shutdown of instances.

argument_reference.name: other_deploy_params
argument_reference.description: A mapping of additional params used when creating new instances.

argument_reference.name: metadata
argument_reference.description: A mapping of metadata key/values to assign to the resource.
